title: OGPvP Pack
description: OG PvP is well... a pvp focused texture pack, mainly for gamemodes like Crystal PVP, Mace, Sword.
body:
# OG PvP pack

![Image made with this pack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/8efcd199919e21c4b7cdf918e18e3b842b328239.png)

This is a very minimal pvp oriented pack.

## The pack has the following features:
- [Custom Crosshair](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/d9a46ce6b9c9f732a419d1d117a5f608d4bde562.png)
- [Saturated Colormap](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/01b62ef809df34b276bfb032f251240f255f3407.png)
- [Old Wood Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/8dd293bcc41510310134e9d3cf48bd03f1cb4538.png)
- [Custom Panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/beb3865d9fd9f60f93be1acf4d919a55b6078425.png)
- [Skybox](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/c807958c50d0b6d1af310145945cc5ea7f028be1.png)
- [Bow Charging States](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/f7f4caade9f039e6118ef4964738347ad95df218.png)
- [Old Stone Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/9279f5baa9f2c03eb78fd77c1ec5f43181683995.png)
- [Old Deepslate Ores](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/AlusJN31/images/c82db68f9d53701b47b6171b017e0727d200e3a1.png)
- And a lot of other stuff that you can find in the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ogpvp/gallery).

## License

## Authors:
